_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_26_note: Session 26 (2026-05-26): MU event-driven deep session — price +18% to $894 ($1 trillion market cap milestone). UBS raised PT from $535 to $1,625 (+204%, largest absolute-dollar PT raise in semiconductor analyst history), citing HBM ASP model raised to +50% YoY and LTAs with NVIDIA through 2029. DCF updated: TTM revenue $80.2B (Q3 FY2026 guidance $33.5B incorporated), TTM EBIT ~$50B, target margin 38%, stable margin 28%. New IV: $442.63 (MoS -50.5%), SELL/AVOID — up from $268.33 on higher base but still deeply overvalued vs. UBS's $1,625 structural franchise case. ANET price corrected from stale $137.53 to actual May 26 close $158.68 (MoS -20.0%, SELL/AVOID). MRVL at ATH ~$212 (+7.7%, pre-earnings PT raises from Stifel/Citi) heading into post-close Q1 FY2027 earnings. Samsung union vote result closed 10am KST (01:00 UTC) — expected approval not yet confirmed. Phases 1b/1c gated (26%6=2). Session 27 ABSOLUTE PRIORITY: (1) Search MRVL Q1 FY2027 actual results FIRST; (2) update story_narrative in valuation/inputs/MRVL.json; (3) run python3 valuation/dcf_model.py MRVL; (4) update dashboard IV/MoS/Rec/Story/Last DCF; (5) remove MRVL from event_queue. Also confirm Samsung vote final result. Computex Jun 1-5 commencing soon — check NVDA (Jensen Jun 1), MRVL (Murphy Jun 2), ALAB (Scorpio X demo).

event_queue.event: Q1 FY2027 earnings post-close May 27. Results not yet indexed at session 26 close. MRVL at ATH ~$212 (+7.7% on May 26). Consensus $2.41B revenue / $0.80 EPS. Options pricing ~13% move. Session 27: search actual results, update story_narrative in MRVL.json, run python3 valuation/dcf_model.py MRVL, update dashboard IV/MoS/Rec/Story/Last DCF, remove from queue.

price +4.4% to $320.39 on May 26 (sector tailwind from MU $1T milestone). MoS updated to -65.1% at actual price. DCF within 30 days (last run May 22). Computex June 2-5 Scorpio X demo is the key near-term catalyst. No DCF re-run required unless thesis changes at Computex.

price +3.19% to $158.68 on May 26 (actual confirmed close; prior sessions used stale $137.53). MoS corrected to -20.0% → SELL/AVOID (prior HOLD recommendation was based on wrong price). DCF last run May 22. No re-run required; price correction captured in dashboard.

_event_queue_note: Session 26: MU processed (event: +18% price move, UBS PT $1,625). MRVL remains first (earnings tonight, result not yet indexed). ALAB and ANET added for price moves >3% on May 26. Session 27 must process MRVL (earnings now released post-session 26 close). Next_deep_session set to ASML (next in rotation after MU). After MRVL processed in session 27, advance to ALAB or ANET in queue, then rotation resumes at ASML.
